version_note: v1.0 records H14 calibration: strict-M (30/72/72), intraday Hurst FLD cycles, overlap-aware MTM equity. 5m is primary execution layer; 15m caveated due to short data window (~104 days).

pattern_detector.calibration_note: thresholds from H14 Phase 1.2 grid sweep — loosest topology-respecting combo yielding max trade count

reference_range.lookback_basis: 1x longest FLD cycle (5m); 0.5x longest FLD cycle (15m); selected by Phase 1.4 Sortino sweep
reference_range.formula: range = high(P1) - min(low) over [P1 - lookback_bars, P1)

initial_stop.rejected_alternative: wider-of structural OR entry-1*ATR(14) — ATR(14) on 5m always tighter than structural, no-op (H14 Phase 2.7)

trail.rule: min(low) over last 3 higher-high bars since entry, excluding inside bars

fld.hurst_agent_canonical_note: hurst-agent DAILY_PERIODS = (10,20,40); no intraday map; using user-proposed harmonics

execution_costs.spread_basis: 3 bps on 5m, 2.5 bps on 15m — conservative retail FX assumption (1-2 pips on DXY ≈ 1.5-3 bps)
execution_costs.applied: entry price raised by spread for longs; exit price lowered by spread for longs

expected_stats_5m_scheme_C.warning: metrics annualized off 3.5-month window — extrapolation, not steady-state

secondary_15m_hypothesis.config: loose-M + pre-entry range + wider-ATR stop (v_all in H14 Phase 2.7)
secondary_15m_hypothesis.validity: crosses trade-count floor but inverts every knob from 5m winner; needs out-of-sample retest on longer history before adoption

regime_overlay_pending.rule: skip 5m entry if daily FLD bias = 'bullish (all 3 cycles below price)'
regime_overlay_pending.rationale: preserves daily Scheme D's selectivity at the 5m execution layer
regime_overlay_pending.implementation_status: not yet wired; planned for Step 4 hurst-agent integration

h14_calibration_provenance.phase_1_2_grid_sweep: 27 cells over origin x peak x wiggle; chosen = max-trade-count topology-respecting cell
h14_calibration_provenance.phase_1_4_range_lookback_sweep: 0.5x/1x/2x of longest FLD cycle; chose 1x on 5m (Sortino +5.52 vs +2.36 / +5.31)
h14_calibration_provenance.phase_2_5_scheme_sweep: A/B/C/D/E; chose C on 5m (Sortino +6.19; beats D +5.52 by 12%)
h14_calibration_provenance.phase_2_7_ablation: 5m baseline wins all knob swaps; 15m v_all wins (Sortino +13.76) but separate optimum

caveats: 104-day data window — Sortino +6 is regime-specific, not steady-state
Scheme C peak exposure ~14x; verify margin
MTM assumes infinite intraday liquidity; news-window slippage will exceed 3 bps
Strict-M thresholds calibrated on the same window used for evaluation — borderline paper-fit, needs OOS validation
